caption: This is a black-and-white illustration depicting an ancient Egyptian scene with stylized figures in profile. A central figure is seated, flanked by two standing figures holding staffs, with various hieroglyphs and symbolic animals like falcons and the Eye of Horus surrounding them. The composition is framed by decorative borders and shows elements characteristic of Egyptian funerary or religious art.

A person with long red hair, wearing a leopard-print top, stands with their back to the camera near a mirror, adjusting their hair. In the background, two other people are seated and appear to be conversing or looking at a phone. The room has framed pictures on the walls, a glass of drink on a dark surface, and a mop leaning against the wall.

Four boys stand in a dusty outdoor area, each holding a toy gun and pointing it at another boy in a staged confrontation. They are dressed in traditional South Asian attire, with one boy in a brown kurta and trousers, another in gray, and a third in black. In the background, other children and a simple, weathered wall are visible under a clear sky.

Two men are embracing, with one’s arms wrapped around the other’s shoulders. The man on the left has visible tattoos on his torso and wears a black leather watch, while the man on the right has a black belt and sunglasses. A ring is visible on the hand resting on the other’s shoulder.
A shirtless man with short hair and a light beard looks directly at the camera. He wears a thick, silver chain necklace with a small padlock pendant. The background is a plain white wall.

A shirtless older man with gray hair smiles at the camera while standing on a wide, sandy beach. Behind him, ocean waves roll toward the shore under a clear blue sky, with rugged mountains visible in the distance.

A close-up shot captures the textured, scaly head of a lizard resting on a bed of dried leaves and twigs. Its large, dark eye with a golden iris is prominent, and the surrounding scales display subtle patterns of brown and gray. The background is softly blurred, emphasizing the reptile’s detailed facial features.

A man and a woman are kissing by the open window of a vintage car. The woman, inside the vehicle, has her hand on the man’s cheek, while he holds her arm. The scene is captured in black and white, with a fence visible in the background.

A woman in a blue shirt is seated at a wooden desk, measuring brown paper with a green tape measure. In the background, two other people are working at similar desks in what appears to be a workshop or classroom setting. A sewing machine and other materials are visible on tables behind her.

A woman stands posing in a studio, wearing a vibrant pink lace lingerie set with matching garter straps holding up black stockings and high heels. She has one hand raised to her head, smiling slightly with her eyes closed, against a plain white background. The watermark “Lucy Rose Photography” is visible across the center of the image.

This is a black-and-white line drawing of two human legs and buttocks, shown from the rear. Both figures are standing barefoot on a simple ground line, with detailed hatching used to render musculature and form. The left figure has a more pronounced, rounded posterior, while the right figure shows a more angular and slender build.

A close-up shot shows a person sleeping with their face resting on their chest. The image captures their closed eyes, nose, and upper chest area, which has visible body hair. The lighting appears soft, and the focus is slightly blurred.

A person wearing a blue bikini lies face down on a blue towel spread across sandy beach, with their arms folded beneath their head. Gentle ocean waves are visible in the background, softly lapping at the shore. The scene is bathed in bright sunlight, highlighting the golden sand and the tranquil beach setting.

A person with visible tattoos on their back and wearing a colorful, patterned garment stands with their back to the camera at a table. Seated at the table are two men, one in a black shirt and the other in a gray tank top with tattoos and a necklace, both facing forward. Behind them, a large screen displays a timer reading "30:29:59" and other interface elements.

A tabby cat lies on a gravel surface, yawning widely with its mouth open, revealing its teeth and tongue. Its striped fur is a mix of gray and brown, and its whiskers extend outward from its face. The cat’s body is relaxed, and its head is tilted slightly upward.

A woman with blonde hair and bangs is posing against a plain background, wearing a white bra and a delicate necklace. She rests her head on her hand, with her gaze directed at the camera. Her fingernails are painted in a mix of purple and blue tones.

A woman with long, wavy hair sits on a bed in a black-and-white photograph, her body angled away from the camera. She rests her chin on her hand, gazing thoughtfully to the side, with one leg bent and the other extended. The soft lighting highlights her silhouette against a plain background, with a simple headboard visible behind her.

A woman lies on her back on a bed, her head turned slightly to the side, eyes open and gazing upward. She is partially covered by a light sheet or garment draped over her body, with one arm resting near her chest. The image is in black and white, with soft focus and natural lighting highlighting her features and the texture of the bedding.

A black-and-white portrait of a mannequin with long, straight dark hair and a fringe, looking slightly upward. The mannequin wears a dark, sleeveless top and has a smooth, featureless face with subtle makeup. The image is viewed through a reflective surface, creating faint streaks and blurring the background.

Three people wearing gorilla masks stand in front of a museum exhibit poster questioning gender representation. The poster reads, “Do women have to be naked to get into the Modern Art sections?” and states below it, “Less than 4% of the Modern Art sections are by women, but 76% of the artists are female.” The person on the left is depicted as nude, while the two on the right wear dark clothing.

Two men are embracing in front of a crowd; one is wearing a red cap and carrying the other on his back, while the other wears white underwear with red and black trim and a black strap across his chest. Both are smiling, and the man in the front also has a phone clipped to his waistband. In the background, other people and buildings are visible, suggesting an outdoor gathering or event.

A crowded outdoor scene features numerous shirtless men, many with tattoos and wearing sunglasses, in what appears to be a public gathering or event. Several men are embracing or kissing, while others stand closely together, suggesting a social or celebratory atmosphere. One man in the foreground wears a black tank top and sunglasses, with a visible tattoo on his arm.

Two men in matching blue striped pajamas are sitting up in bed, smiling and making peace signs with their hands while holding up a white comforter. Above them on the wall hang two framed signs with yellow backgrounds that read "HAIR PEACE." and "BED PEACE." respectively. The room has a simple white color scheme with a white headboard and bedding.

A close-up shot shows a person’s lower back and hip partially covered by rumpled, striped fabric. The background is a plain, out-of-focus light-colored wall. The focus is shallow, blurring the foreground and background elements.

A hand gently grips the edge of a blue and white striped fabric, possibly a shirt or blanket, with a soft-focus background revealing part of a person’s torso. The fingers curve slightly around the material, which has visible folds and texture. The image is tightly framed, emphasizing the interaction between the hand and the fabric.

A dramatic, dimly lit painting shows a muscular, nude male figure in the foreground, his body partially turned and draped with a cloth. The scene is rendered in dark, earthy tones with heavy shadows, and the background is obscured in near darkness, suggesting a turbulent or chaotic setting. The composition emphasizes chiaroscuro, highlighting the figure's form against the murky surroundings.

A shirtless man with extensive tattoos on his chest, arms, and neck is shown, featuring a prominent chest piece with wings and a heart, along with a portrait tattoo on his left arm. He has a large hoop earring in his left ear and a red tattoo on his neck. Behind him, another heavily tattooed person is partially visible, wearing a black shirt with a white cross emblem.

A group of women in revealing, stylized outfits pose near a banner that reads "EXPO BALL GATE." The woman in the foreground wears a bright yellow top and black leather shorts, while others behind her wear black crop tops and shorts, some with accessories like headbands and fishnet stockings. They appear to be in an indoor exhibition or event space.

A person with long hair and a beard sits at a table covered with a black cloth, looking toward the right. In front of them, a woman with long blonde hair stands wearing a grey crop top and a black mini skirt, her back to the camera. A man in a suit is partially visible to the right, seated beside the woman.

A shirtless man with tattoos, wearing black-and-white striped pants and silver gloves, is crouching while holding a large metal ball and chain. He is indoors on a polished concrete floor, surrounded by people in casual attire. A green wristband is visible on his left wrist as he leans forward with the chain.

Three people pose together for a photo: a woman in a black lace dress and blazer, a bride in a white lace gown with a cream hijab, and a man in a dark suit with a light tie. The bride and groom smile at the camera, while the woman on the left smiles warmly. Behind them, a floral arrangement with red and white flowers is visible against a plain wall.

A shirtless person with a beard is shown from the shoulders up, their hand resting on their neck and upper shoulder. The image is softly focused with a bright, plain white background. The lighting is even and highlights the contours of the neck and shoulder.

A person is shown from behind, wearing a striped shirt with their hands on their hips. A black tattoo featuring an ornate, symmetrical design is visible on their lower back. The image is in black and white, with the background blurred.

A man and a woman are posing together at an event with a black backdrop featuring the ABC logo and "American Crime" text. The woman, on the left, wears a black lace dress and smiles, while the man, on the right, wears a gray suit over a white shirt and also smiles. Both appear to be looking toward the camera.

A close-up portrait of a man with his head bowed, illuminated by a single light source against a dark background. His curly hair and facial features are partially lit, casting deep shadows across his face and neck. The image is rendered in a monochromatic, cool-toned palette.

A performer in a colorful costume with a red mask, purple and yellow outfit, and a tall, pointed hat stands on a dimly lit stage. Behind them, a green backdrop partially displays the word “PARTY,” and stage lights cast blue and purple hues. The individual gestures with one hand, appearing mid-performance.

This is a digitally altered image of Barack Obama at a podium. He is depicted with a hot dog in his mouth and holding a bone in one hand while pulling a tie with the other. The podium sign reads "WOOF!" and includes the text "Iowa.BarkObama.com" along with a "Beware of Owner" warning.

A woman in a bright pink sweater and dark leggings lies on her back on a white couch, reading a book with the title “FONCIA” visible on the cover. Her head rests on a patterned pillow, and her hair, a mix of dark and reddish tones, fans out over the couch cushion. The scene is softly lit, with a muted, slightly vintage color tone.

A wall with graffiti reading "Ich Liebe dich nicht!" in black and red spray paint, with a red tag above that appears to be "MOC" with a cross through it. The image has a spotlight effect, illuminating the central text against a dimly lit, textured background. The overall composition features a dark vignette around the edges.

A woman with blonde hair stands facing forward, wearing a black leather crop top, black high-waisted bottoms with a white numbered tag, and a white headband with "Jack Daniel's" printed on it. She is posing in front of a mirror, which reflects her back and the back of her outfit. A green plant is partially visible at the bottom right corner of the frame.

The image shows a white ceramic urinal mounted on a wall in a tiled restroom stall. The entire scene is bathed in a strong blue light, which casts a monochromatic blue hue over the tiles and the fixture. The stall walls and floor are covered in square blue tiles.

A woman in a blue mermaid costume dances energetically in a street parade, her arms raised and holding a cup. Around her, other costumed participants, including a person in a Roman-style helmet and another in a green mermaid outfit, mingle alongside spectators and barricades. The scene is set on a city street with visible signs, suggesting an urban festival or carnival.

This is a stylized, expressive artwork depicting two women in close proximity. The woman on the left has her eyes closed and is smiling, while the woman on the right gazes forward with her eyes open. Both have curly hair and are rendered with bold, sketchy lines and a palette dominated by earthy greens and yellows.

A close-up of a weathered, light-colored marble statue focusing on the curve of its hip and thigh. The statue is set against a backdrop of a patterned, diamond-shaped window with light filtering through. The surface of the marble shows signs of age and texture, with visible wear and subtle discoloration.

A woman with tattoos and a cigarette in her mouth holds an American flag while seated. She wears a black tank top, has intricate arm tattoos, and holds a green marker in her hand. Behind her, a drummer is partially visible near a drum kit and audio equipment.

Three shirtless men are standing and talking on a street corner near a building with "Smog Check" and "Test Only" signs, with one man gesturing while the others listen. Behind them, other people are visible, including a woman in a patterned top and a person holding up a phone. The scene includes a traffic light, street signs indicating "10th St," and a brick wall with graffiti and banners.

A stylized watercolor and ink illustration depicts a woman reclining on a blue surface, wearing a pink dress with white ruffles and black stockings. Her hands are raised to her head, and she has a small red bow in her hair, with a green patterned garment beside her. The background is a textured blue wash, and the piece is signed in the lower corners.

In a wrestling ring, a muscular wrestler with dreadlocks holds a man’s head while a blonde woman in a teal top and fishnet sleeves leans against the ropes, appearing to be in distress. A referee in a striped shirt stands nearby, observing the scene. Spectators are visible in the foreground and background, watching the action unfold.

A man with glasses and a beard is playing the drums on a stage, wearing a black T-shirt with white graphics. He is seated behind a drum kit, with cymbals and drumsticks visible, and a microphone stand nearby. Behind him, a sign for “PARKING” and metal stage trusses are partially visible.

A woman with blonde hair wears an elaborate, glittering white veil and a matching beaded dress, accessorized with a silver necklace and a decorative forehead piece. On her right arm, a colorful tattoo of a cartoon cat wearing a blue bandana is visible. The background shows a blurred indoor setting with patterned carpeting and other people.

A person is reclining in a bathtub filled with soapy water, their head tilted back and mouth open in what appears to be a laugh or exhalation. The image is in black and white, showing the person’s bare shoulders and neck, with bubbles surrounding them. Their eyes are closed, and their dark hair is submerged in the water.

A man with long, dark, curly hair and a beard is shown in profile, sticking his tongue out. He wears a colorful tie-dye shirt, and the background is dark and indistinct. His gaze is directed upward and to the side.

A man with a beard and tattoos is playing the drums, holding a drumstick and looking upward with his mouth open. He wears a blue t-shirt with white text and is positioned in front of a drum set, including cymbals and part of a guitar. The background features a plain white wall and a window with blinds.

A yellow construction vehicle is parked on a mound of dirt and rocks in front of a large stone church. The church has a tall arched window, a steep roof, and a cross atop its steeple. A second smaller excavator is visible in the background to the right.

A woman with blonde hair, wearing glasses and a yellow jacket, smiles at the camera in a dimly lit setting. Behind her, a man in a pink shirt is out of focus, and another person is visible in the background. The scene is illuminated by colorful, ambient lighting, suggesting a nightlife or party environment.

A shirtless young man with short dark hair and a light beard stands outdoors, leaning against a tree trunk. He has a tattoo of a tree with red blossoms on his left upper arm and is looking slightly off to the side. The background consists of dense green foliage and trees under natural, diffused lighting.

A woman and two young children are gathered around a table with a birthday cake, blowing out candles as part of a celebration. A small sign next to the cake reads "Eat Me..". A person on the right is holding a camera, capturing the moment.

A woman in a black top and leopard-print leggings poses with one leg on the hood of a blue Fiat 500, her hand resting on the car's surface. The vintage car, featuring yellow round headlights and a license plate reading "XHO 521," is parked in a lot with other cars nearby. Trees and a cloudy sky form the background of the scene.

A classical painting of The Last Supper is displayed on a stage with a red curtain, framed by an ornate arched architectural setting. The scene depicts Jesus and the twelve apostles seated at a long table, with detailed background elements including a vaulted ceiling and statues. The painting is viewed from the perspective of an empty wooden-floored room.

A person with dramatic makeup and a brown wig is lying on a wooden table, wearing a red dress, black gloves, and high heels. They are accessorized with a silver chain collar that has a padlock attached. Behind them, a white cabinet and a doorway are visible in a dimly lit room.

This is a close-up of graffiti on a wall, featuring layered spray paint in brown, white, and dark green. The central message, written in green, reads “Fuck Donald Trump.” The text is partially obscured by large, overlapping brown and white spray-painted shapes.

A woman stands in front of a brightly colored, geometrically patterned wall. The wall features a repeating design of overlapping squares and stripes in shades of teal, pink, black, and yellow against a white background. She is wearing a white tank top and denim shorts, with her hair tied back.

A woman with short dark hair and sunglasses is shown in profile against a dark background. A single light source illuminates the right side of her face, creating strong contrast and shadows. She wears small hoop earrings and a dark zippered garment with a thin necklace.

A person with long wavy hair is shown in dim, moody lighting, their face illuminated with a blue hue. Bright pink heart-shaped lights are projected onto their cheeks. They wear a dark leather-style garment with a belt buckle at the neck and a dangling earring.

Two children are seated at a table in a dimly lit room with floral wallpaper and a window in the background. The child in the foreground, with a bob haircut, smiles at the camera while the other child, wearing a headband and overalls, sits behind them. The table has plates, cups, and a patterned cloth, suggesting a mealtime scene.

A white rectangular box with the "FIX" logo is stacked vertically on a wooden surface, next to a blue and white product warranty card that also displays the "FIX" logo and a QR code. The warranty card has Korean text, including "제품보증서" (Product Warranty Certificate), and fields for model, purchase date, and registration. The box has text at the bottom reading "Designed by FIX in Korea."

A woman sits barefoot on a wooden step in front of a weathered wooden doorway, wearing a pink tank top and light-colored shorts. Behind her, a calendar is pinned to the wood, and a blue curtain with floral patterns hangs to the side. The image has a stylized, posterized color treatment.

A nude person is positioned upside down, balancing on their hands and feet atop a fallen log in a dense forest. The scene is captured in black and white, with tall, slender trees surrounding the figure, creating a secluded and natural setting. The individual’s head hangs downward, their face nearly obscured by long hair.

A bronze statue of a nude woman wearing a red Santa hat stands on a wooden platform with blue railings. Behind her are beige stone buildings with blue-framed windows and a balcony, one featuring a "TE KOOP" (For Sale) sign. A gated arched doorway and a reddish-tiled roof are visible in the background.

A person wearing black strappy high heels and sheer black pantyhose is seated on a red couch, with one leg crossed over the other. In the background, a wooden table holds a small, decorated Christmas tree with lights, and a patterned rug is visible on the floor. The scene appears to be indoors, with soft, ambient lighting.

A muscular, shirtless man wearing a black mask and a pink wristband strikes a victory pose with both arms raised and index fingers pointing upward. He has a tattoo on his left pectoral and is standing in front of stage equipment and barriers at what appears to be a lively indoor event. Other people, including one in a red shirt, are visible in the background under colorful lighting.

A person with short hair is seen from behind, arms raised, wearing a light-colored lingerie set with fringe and black lace garter straps, standing in front of a wooden paneled wall. The scene is illuminated by colored stage lighting, casting a yellow and purple glow across the individual's back and surroundings. A red chair is partially visible on the right edge of the frame.

This is a vintage yellow ticket for the 1966 World Championship Quarter Final football match held at Roker Park Ground, Sunderland. The ticket, marked for Block H, Roker End, includes a handwritten signature, the date Saturday, July 23, a 3:00 p.m. kickoff, and seating information indicating a standing position with a 7/6 bet. It also features a printed note stating “be retained (see plan & conditions on back).”

A woman with dark hair and sunglasses wears an elaborate feathered jacket, revealing a visible tattoo on her chest that reads "BELIEVE." She stands in a backstage or changing area, with another person partially visible in the background near clothing racks and a blue curtain. The setting appears casual and behind-the-scenes, with industrial elements like exposed pipes and hanging garments.

A black and white photo shows a man and two children walking on a sidewalk outside a modern building with large glass doors. The children, dressed in winter coats and hats, walk on a concrete ledge while the man walks beside them. The building's windows reflect the surrounding urban environment.

A man sits indoors near a bright window with multiple panes, partially obscured by sheer curtains. He is wearing a dark, patterned jacket and has a cigarette or cigar in his mouth. The room is dimly lit except for the strong light coming through the window, which creates a high-contrast scene.

A black-and-white photo shows four men sitting on a sidewalk curb, all focused on their smartphones. One man leans against a building, while another sits beside him, and two boys sit on the ground in front of them. A mannequin is visible in a shop window behind them, and a scooter is parked on the street nearby.

Three people sit side by side at a wooden table in front of a paneled wooden wall. Two lit candles are placed on the table between them, with the person on the right appearing to be writing or reading from papers. The person in the center, a man in a suit and red tie, looks forward while the other two also face forward in a formal setting.

A woman in a red satin romper with black lace trim and red high heels stands on a rooftop balcony, posing with one hand on the railing. She has dark hair with bangs and is looking back over her shoulder with a smile. The background shows a brick wall and distant rooftops under an overcast sky.

A woman stands posing in front of a backdrop with repeated text, wearing a short black leather dress, black high heels, and holding a small black clutch with feathers. Her long dark hair is styled straight, and she looks directly at the camera. The floor beneath her is made of dark wood planks arranged in a pattern.

A nude figure with dark hair sits atop a fantastical, snouted beast with horns and a long neck, set against a dark, wood-textured background. Behind the figure, a large blue bird with yellow beak and wings perches on their shoulder. Sparse black dots and a portion of another creature’s limb appear at the edges of the scene.

A cartoonish skeleton wearing a white head wrap and black collar is shown against a blurred green background. The skeleton has large, red-irised eyes and a wide, toothy grin. White text to the right reads, “Silence!!! There..z election campaign!”

Two stylized figurines with white hair and green reptilian tails stand on a tiled floor, one reflected in a mirror. The figurine in the foreground has pink hair accents and green scaly feet, while the mirrored version holds a small green object. Both have bare, pale skin and pointed ears, suggesting an elf-like or fantasy creature design.

This is a vibrant, psychedelic poster advertising "THE UNDERGROUND" event at Lunds Konsthall in February 1969. The central image features a nude woman with blonde hair, smoking a pipe, set against a colorful background with a cannabis leaf and abstract patterns. A circular design on the right reads "MEAN REVOLUTION COUSINESS" in a stylized font.

A person wearing a two-piece swimsuit bends over at the waist in shallow ocean water. Their back is to the viewer, and their arms are extended toward the water’s surface. Dark, mossy rocks are visible in the background near the shoreline.

A close-up view from behind shows the bare shoulders and upper back of a person with short dark hair. The lighting is dim and diffused, casting soft shadows across the skin. A white fabric, possibly a towel or garment, is draped around the lower back.

A woman in a black bikini stands in shallow water at the beach, her arms outstretched toward the sky. Her back is to the camera, and her long hair flows down her back as she faces the ocean. The scene is captured in black and white, with a distant shoreline visible under an overcast sky.

Two nude mannequins stand against a black background, one with arms at sides and the other with one hand on hip. Both have short blonde hair and appear to be posed for display. A watermark reading "votre shopping 24/24" is visible at the bottom.

This is a digitally manipulated satirical image featuring a close-up of Donald Trump with his mouth open and pointing his finger. Behind him are silhouettes of nude men, and bold yellow and red text overlays read “EU TO INTRODUCE NUDE ANTI SUICIDE BOMBER AIRPORT CHECK IN MEASURES” and “HE’S GOT A WEAPON.” The bottom of the image includes the hashtag “#voteNOeu.”

The image features a long, straight paved road stretching toward distant mountains under a cloudy sky. Superimposed over the scene is a quote in white text: “It is better to go to your grave with no children at all than to have children who are godless.” – Sirach 16:3. The source “www.bbmquotes.com” is visible at the bottom.

A firefighter in full gear, including a helmet and protective clothing, holds a radio while standing in a narrow, tiled hallway. The individual appears focused, looking off to the side with a serious expression. Various equipment straps, a badge, and a flashlight are visible on their uniform.

A woman in a colorful patterned dress and headwrap sits on the ground with a young child wearing a "VOGUE-KID" shirt. Both are oriented away from the camera, sitting on a dirt surface with scattered sandals and a coconut husk nearby. Behind them is a concrete wall, greenery, and a large tire, suggesting an outdoor, possibly rural setting.

A person in a red and black uniform with a black face mask and helmet stands holding a rifle, positioned next to a gray tent in a paved area. The uniform includes tactical gear and reflective stripes on the sleeves and legs. In the background, vehicles and trees are visible under daylight.

A close-up view from behind shows a person wearing a blue top and gray plaid pants, seated on a bicycle. The bike’s black saddle, with “CANYON” written in yellow, is positioned directly on the person’s backside. The background is a plain, out-of-focus gray surface.

A woman in a black bikini and bow tie is running through shallow, murky water, creating splashes around her. In the background, several people in yellow waterproof gear and blue gloves stand in the water. The scene appears to be part of a public event or challenge involving water.

A puppet dressed as a police officer with a blue hat and mustache is seated inside a glass display case, interacting with another puppet that has a round head and orange hair. The display is set against a white pegboard wall with handwritten text, and the glass reflects some surrounding environment. The case is framed by a brick wall on one side.

A woman with dark hair is kneeling on a bed, pulling down her white tank top to reveal pink underwear. She has one hand raised to her head and is looking downward. The background features a white paneled wall and a dark headboard.

A black-and-white photograph shows four individuals—two men and two women—dressed in early 20th-century formal attire, standing outdoors in front of a building with vertical slats. The men wear suits and hats, one with a bow tie and a pin on his lapel, while the women wear dresses with fur collars and hats. All four are looking toward the right side of the frame.

A woman with long, dark hair and light-colored eyes looks directly at the camera against a plain white background. She wears a delicate gold necklace with a small cross pendant and a simple earring. A watermark for "Martín Photography" is visible in the lower-left corner.

This is a vintage postcard from 1917, bearing the printed header "POST CARD" and the location "FLOODS AT RENMARK, S. AUSTRALIA." The handwritten message describes floodwaters at Renmark and mentions difficulty crossing a bridge on the Renmark to Morgan road. The card also features a vertical "KODAK AUSTRALIA" logo along the right edge.

A shirtless man with short, styled hair smiles at the camera, his bare chest showing defined musculature. Behind him is a colorful, abstract painting with warm yellows, oranges, and reds, featuring brushstroke-like floral or tree-like forms. The lighting highlights his face and upper torso, suggesting a posed portrait.

A woman with long dark hair smiles playfully while posing indoors, holding a large black photography light on a tripod. She wears a black tank top, patterned leggings with a gold chain design, and brown high-heeled shoes. The background features a plain white door and light-colored wooden flooring.

A stylized illustration of a woman with dark hair and green eyes, wearing a white top over a black garment. Her arms are raised behind her head, and she has bold red lipstick. The artwork uses flat color blocks and simplified shading against a plain white background.

Inside a grand cathedral, two clergy members in ornate vestments stand at the altar during a ceremonial service, illuminated by golden candelabras and flanked by kneeling attendants in ceremonial robes. The scene is framed by arched wooden pillars and an intricate backdrop featuring religious iconography. The photo, credited to Janet Best, captures the solemnity and opulence of the liturgical moment.

A shirtless man wearing sunglasses stands in front of a rugged, arid hillside under a clear blue sky. The image is overlaid with Thanksgiving-themed graphics, including a "Happy Thanksgiving" banner, pumpkins, a cornucopia, and a cartoon turkey.

A woman with a voluminous, deep red afro hairstyle poses against a plain beige background. She wears a matching set of light pink lingerie, including a bra and high-waisted panties with lace detailing, along with an open, silky satin robe of the same color. One hand lightly touches her hair while she looks directly at the camera.

A group of people are gathered around a small table indoors, engaged in conversation and enjoying food. Several individuals wear green lanyards, suggesting they are attendees at an event or conference. The setting includes modern interior elements like glass walls and wooden panels, with additional people visible in the background.

A smiling woman stands outdoors in a festive, possibly parade-like setting, wearing a blue beaded skirt, a light green sheer shawl, and a pearl necklace. She has decorative blue and white coverings on her chest, a pearl headpiece, and holds ornate vertical poles. People are visible in the background, suggesting a public, lively event.

A person wearing a black hooded mask with a menacing red mouth opening holds a blood-stained knife in one hand while their other hand, also covered in blood, is raised near their face. The image is predominantly black and white, with selective color highlighting the red blood and the mask’s mouth. The background is plain and dark, emphasizing the figure and their weapon.

A detailed tattoo on a person’s thigh features a coiled snake intertwined with vibrant red and pink peonies with green leaves. The tattoo, rendered in black and gray with vivid color accents, spans from the hip down the leg. The person is wearing frayed denim shorts, and the artist's signature "Ben Lucas" is visible in the lower right corner.

A person wearing a dark jacket and a baseball cap stands on a green Werner ladder in a garden, holding a yellow paper and a blue cloth. To their left is a large stone statue of a Buddhist figure, with a blue and white patterned pot nearby. The background shows leafy greenery and colorful flags hanging from branches.

This is a close-up of a monochromatic sketch depicting a nude child with curly hair, looking downward. The artwork uses granular shading techniques to render form and shadow, with the child’s torso and arms visible against a dark, textured background.
